# Case dispose-removed-chunk: Step 3

## Changed Files
- a.js
- b.js
- module.js

## Asset Files
- Bundle: a_js.CURRENT_HASH.js
- Bundle: bundle.js
- Manifest: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 42
- Update: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 626

## Manifest

### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["main"],"r":["b_js"],"m":["./b.js"]}
```


## Update


### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./module.js

#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("main", {
"./module.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export)
});
/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = (__rspack_require.e(/* import() */ "a_js").then(__rspack_require.bind(__rspack_require, "./a.js")));


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__rspack_require.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```




## Runtime
### Status

```txt
check => prepare => dispose => apply => idle
```
